features.name: Immutable source archive
features.description: Preserve every uploaded document byte-for-byte with SHA-256 provenance. Nothing is deleted or overwritten.
source_basis: all uploaded documents
acceptance_criteria: Manifest maps original names to hashes

features.name: Page-aware extraction
features.description: Extract PDF text by page into Markdown and structured metadata while retaining page provenance.
source_basis: RAG and source-preservation discussions
acceptance_criteria: Every readable PDF has an extracted Markdown file

features.name: Modular chunk index
features.description: Split semi-random transcripts into reusable chunks with tags, risk tier, source hash, page, and canonical duplicate ID.
source_basis: Request to index semi-random knowledge into modular features, playbooks, and RAG

features.name: Safe default retrieval
features.description: Default RAG excludes prompt-injection and operationally harmful content while retaining it in the immutable archive and quarantine index.
source_basis: Mixed prompt experiments and operational material in source corpus
acceptance_criteria: Safe query CLI searches safe index by default

features.name: Prompt-injection quarantine
features.description: Identify persona-lock, never-refuse, auto-reframe, safety-bypass, and instruction-hijacking material as data rather than executable instructions.
source_basis: Nyx persona and auto-reframe documents
acceptance_criteria: Retrieval policy marks source text non-authoritative

features.name: Deduplication without deletion
features.description: Group exact and near-duplicate documents/chunks while preserving every original artifact.
source_basis: Existing T1 SHA-256 RAG sync and user requirement not to delete anything

features.name: Feature catalog
features.description: Convert recurring ideas and roadmap items into modular feature cards with priority, module, source basis, and acceptance criteria.
source_basis: Game roadmaps, system summaries, missing-feature lists
acceptance_criteria: Each feature maps to sources and implementation area

features.name: Playbook library
features.description: Turn repeated workflows into operational development playbooks: ingestion, retrieval, feature extraction, blue-team scenarios, and repository changes.
source_basis: README-before-changes workflows and implementation guidance
acceptance_criteria: Each has inputs, steps, outputs, and validation

features.name: Blue-team simulation knowledge
features.description: Index detection, investigation, suspicion, legal/compliance, and defensive simulation material for safe scenario generation.
source_basis: Blue Team AI, detection and police-method sections

features.name: Core strategy simulation model
features.description: Game-state model covering crews, territories, turn loop, reputation, risk, health, economy, events, and AI personalities.
source_basis: Game development transcripts and RAG document index
acceptance_criteria: Game mechanics use fictionalized and non-operational abstractions

features.name: Dynamic narrative engine
features.description: Generate story events from indexed case patterns and game state, using safe abstractions and provenance.
source_basis: RAG narrative generation roadmap
acceptance_criteria: No actionable criminal instructions are emitted

features.name: Risk and suspicion engine
features.description: Generic risk-scoring and detection-threshold mechanics for strategy simulations.
source_basis: Blue Team action logic, OPSEC/suspicion mechanics
acceptance_criteria: Defensive detection is emphasized over evasion

features.name: NPC personality and behavior
features.description: Reusable personality archetypes and behavior policies for AI-controlled crews and investigators.
source_basis: AI personality, psychology, and behavior notes

features.name: Economic simulation abstraction
features.description: Abstract cash-flow, capacity, demand, costs, and anomaly-detection mechanics without real-world laundering instructions.
source_basis: Economic simulation and financial-risk notes

features.name: Intelligence and information system
features.description: Game-level information gathering, uncertainty, fog-of-war, and counter-intelligence as abstract mechanics.
source_basis: Intelligence/espionage roadmap

features.name: Recruitment and loyalty simulation
features.description: Fictional NPC recruitment, loyalty, skill, morale, and attrition mechanics.
source_basis: Active recruitment and J-system sections
acceptance_criteria: No targeting of vulnerable real people
Influence mechanics remain fictional and consent-aware

features.name: Territory and map layer
features.description: Visual map and territory-control layer with configurable fictional zones and risk/reward profiles.
source_basis: 10 territories, real-time map, territory defense roadmap

features.name: Case-pattern library
features.description: Structured, cited case patterns for defensive analysis and narrative inspiration, separated from operational instructions.
source_basis: 74+ cases and case library references

features.name: AI change-control workflow
features.description: Require AI/developers to classify a request as data, code, feature, playbook, or quarantined source before making changes.
source_basis: README_BEFORE_ANY_CHANGES concepts
acceptance_criteria: Change includes plan, provenance, validation, and non-deletion check

features.name: Spec and issue generator
features.description: Generate Spec-Kit-style feature specs and GitHub issue drafts from feature cards.
source_basis: User request for modular features, TODOs, and GitHub integration
acceptance_criteria: No issue is created automatically without explicit approval
